prompt: Create a cinematic anime close-up of a smug young man leaning toward the viewer in a dark industrial setting. He has messy, tousled black hair falling over his forehead and partially covering one eye, sharp narrow gray eyes, tan skin, strong angular facial features, and a confident teasing smirk. His right hand is thrust forward toward the camera in extreme foreground, palm angled upward with fingers curled in a beckoning gesture, heavily foreshortened and slightly out of focus to emphasize depth. Frame the shot from below at a slight upward angle, with the face occupying the left-center and the hand dominating the right foreground. Use dramatic hard lighting with deep shadows across half of his face, a bright highlight on the cheek and nose, and muted cool tones. The background should be blurred gray metal or concrete panels with a gritty, worn texture, suggesting an alley, warehouse, or underground facility. Style: high-quality modern anime key visual, crisp linework, expressive eyes, cinematic shading, shallow depth of field, widescreen 16:9 composition, intense moody atmosphere. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
